raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX CFPB Complaint Statement Subject : Complaint Failure to Properly Investigate Unauthorized Overcharge I am filing this complaint regarding my credit card issuers failure to properly investigate a billing error under the Fair Credit Billing Act. 
I was charged {$310.00} by XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. However, I possess the signed merchant receipt reflecting an authorized amount of {$100.00}. The posted charge exceeds the authorized amount by {$200.00}. 
I submitted the signed receipt to the card issuer as evidence. The issuer responded that the merchant considers the charge valid and refused to issue a credit. The issuer did not provide : A copy of any signed authorization for {$310.00} Any explanation for the discrepancy Documentation showing a lawful basis for increasing the charge The issuers position appears to rely solely on the merchants assertion rather than a reasonable investigation as required by federal law. 
This matter concerns an unauthorized overcharge, not a refund request or dissatisfaction with services. 
I request that the issuer be required to : 1. Provide documentary proof that I authorized {$310.00} ; or 2. Reverse the unauthorized {$200.00} overcharge. 
I have provided copies of the signed receipt, final invoice and letter from manager. 
XXXX XXXX
